title: Trump Extends Iran Cease-Fire Before Deadline Expires; Vance’s Trip Is on Hold
summary_full: President Trump attributed his decision to divisions among the Iranians about how to proceed and said he wanted to give them more time.
summary_public: President Trump attributed his decision to divisions among the Iranians about how to proceed and said he wanted to give them more time.
